commands.review_summary:
The PR changes diagnostics-otel OTLP/stdout log export so withheld log bodies emit `[message redacted]` with a reserved `openclaw.log.body_redacted` marker, plus focused tests and docs.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +16, Docs +2. Total +28 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main and the latest release emit `body: "log"` when log body capture is disabled, and current focused tests assert that placeholder. I did not run tests in this read-only cleanup review, but the PR body lists focused local and Testbox diagnostics-otel validation.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because this draft maintainer PR deliberately changes the exported OTEL/stdout log body contract.

target.title: fix: make redacted OTEL log bodies explicit
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where operators exporting OpenClaw diagnostic logs to OTEL or stdout JSONL would see the placeholder body `log` when log message capture was disabled. That made an intentionally withheld message look like the actual log text was `log`.

## Why This Change Was Made

Withheld diagnostic log bodies now export as `[message redacted]` and include the reserved `openclaw.log.body_redacted: true` attribute. The marker is internal-only, so caller-supplied diagnostic attributes cannot spoof or overwrite it, and broad `diagnostics.otel.captureContent: true` still exports the normalized/redacted real message body without the marker.

## User Impact

Operators and downstream log processors can reliably distinguish redacted diagnostic log bodies from real message content without weakening the existing content-capture privacy boundary.

## Evidence

Behavioral proof:

- Focused diagnostics-otel tests cover stdout-only export, stdout+OTLP export, default OTLP export, granular `captureContent.*`, broad `captureContent: true`, trusted trace-context logs, caller attempts to spoof `openclaw.log.body_redacted`, and max-attribute pressure around the reserved marker.
- Documentation now states that withheld OTEL log bodies use `[message redacted]` and `openclaw.log.body_redacted: true`.

Verification:

- `git diff --check` passed.
- `node scripts/docs-list.js docs/gateway/opentelemetry.md` passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts` passed locally: 95 tests.
- Testbox-through-Crabbox `tbx_01kwchhsb44xftkpm5pjrx1pbq` passed `corepack pnpm test extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`: 95 tests.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` passed with no accepted/actionable findings after fixing its marker-overwrite and marker-cap findings.
- `codex review --base origin/main` found no correctness issue.
target.author: jesse-merhi
